description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a smooth, slightly ribbed orange surface and a green, slightly curved stem at the top. The front of the pumpkin is intricately carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring two triangular eyes, a small triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth with a toothy grin. The interior of the pumpkin is hollow, visible through the carved openings, and the edges of the cutouts are clean and sharp. The back and sides of the pumpkin are uncarved, displaying the natural texture and color of the pumpkin's skin. The stem is robust and textured, providing a realistic organic appearance. There are no additional decorative accessories or embellishments present on the pumpkin.
description: A round orange pumpkin with a green stem, carved in a classic jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, nose, and a wide, jagged mouth. The back and sides are uncarved, showing a smooth, ribbed surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, ribbed orange surface and the green stem, with the carved face partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, nose, and a wide, jagged mouth.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the smooth, ribbed orange surface and green stem, with the carved face partially visible on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the uncarved, smooth, ribbed orange surface and the green stem.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes, a small triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth with a toothy grin. The cutouts are clean and geometric, typical of classic Halloween motifs.
